_meta.description: 12岁级词汇和句子，覆盖学术、抽象概念、复杂表达等进阶场景

words.synonymDiff: analyze侧重系统分析, examine侧重仔细检查
evaluate侧重评估价值, assess侧重评定等级, judge侧重判断对错
interpret侧重理解含义, explain侧重讲清楚
identify侧重辨认出, recognize侧重认出熟悉的事物
predict侧重根据判断预测, forecast侧重用数据预报
estimate侧重估算, guess随意猜, approximate侧重近似值
demonstrate侧重演示证明, show泛指展示
investigate侧重正式调查, examine侧重检查, look into较口语
categorize侧重按标准分类, classify更学术, sort侧重排序整理
distinguish侧重辨别差异, differentiate更学术, tell apart更口语

sentences.en: Let me summarize the main points.
We need to evaluate our options.
sentences.cn: 我们需要评估我们的选择。

sentences.en: What can you conclude from this?
sentences.cn: 你能从中得出什么结论？

sentences.en: Try to predict what happens next.
sentences.cn: 试着预测接下来会发生什么。

words.synonymDiff: hypothesis侧重待验证的假设, theory有依据的理论, assumption主观假定
evidence侧重证据材料, proof侧重确凿证明
experiment侧重科学实验, test侧重测试, trial侧重试验尝试
research侧重深入研究, study侧重学习或研究
data侧重原始数据, information侧重加工后的信息
source侧重来源出处, origin侧重起源起点
method侧重具体方法, approach侧重方式思路, way最通用
process侧重过程流程, procedure侧重正式步骤规程
result侧重直接结果, outcome侧重最终结局
energy侧重能量活力, power侧重力量权力
force侧重外力作用力, power侧重能力权力, strength侧重自身力气
motion侧重物理运动, movement侧重移动或社会运动
velocity有方向，speed无方向
electricity特指电力, power泛指能源或力量

sentences.en: Energy cannot be created or destroyed.
sentences.cn: 能量不能被创造或毁灭。

words.synonymDiff: reaction侧重反应回应, response侧重回复答复

examples.cn: 一个有创意的解决方案。

words.synonymDiff: mixture侧重混合物, blend侧重调和融合

sentences.cn: 一切都是由原子组成的。

sentences.en: Water is a compound of hydrogen and oxygen.
Ice is a solid form of water.
A chemical reaction can produce heat.
sentences.cn: 化学反应可以产生热量。

words.synonymDiff: organism侧重生物体(学术), creature泛指生物, living thing最通俗
bacteria是学术用语细菌, germs是日常用语病菌

sentences.en: All living things are made of cells.
sentences.cn: 所有生物都是由细胞组成的。

sentences.en: Plants use photosynthesis to make food.
sentences.cn: 植物用光合作用制造食物。

sentences.en: Bacteria can be good or bad.

words.synonymDiff: divide侧重分开分割, split侧重劈开裂开
percent用于具体数字后, percentage指百分比概念
negative侧重否定的/负面的, minus侧重数学减号
average侧重一般水平, mean侧重数学平均值

sentences.en: Three multiplied by four equals twelve.

examples.en: The radius is half the diameter.

words.synonymDiff: sphere侧重几何球体, globe侧重地球仪, ball侧重日常球

sentences.en: Calculate the area of this rectangle.
sentences.cn: 算出这个长方形的面积。

sentences.en: A right angle is ninety degrees.
What's the volume of this cube?
sentences.cn: 这个正方体的体积是多少？

examples.en: Life is a journey — that's a metaphor.
examples.cn: 人生是一段旅程——这是隐喻。

examples.en: As brave as a lion — that's a simile.
examples.cn: 像狮子一样勇敢——这是明喻。

examples.en: What's the theme of the story?
examples.cn: 这个故事的主题是什么？

words.synonymDiff: theme侧重主题思想, topic侧重话题, subject侧重科目或主题
plot侧重故事情节结构, storyline侧重故事线索

examples.en: The main conflict in the story.

words.synonymDiff: conflict侧重冲突对立, struggle侧重挣扎奋斗
narrator侧重文学叙述者, storyteller侧重讲故事的人

examples.cn: 我最喜欢的类型是奇幻。

words.synonymDiff: genre侧重文艺体裁, type泛指类型, category侧重分类
biography指正式传记, life story指人生故事(较通俗)

sentences.en: What's the theme of this story?
sentences.cn: 这个故事的主题是什么？

sentences.en: The plot has an unexpected twist.
sentences.cn: 情节有一个出乎意料的转折。

sentences.en: A simile compares two things using 'like' or 'as'.
sentences.cn: 明喻用'像'来比较两个事物。

sentences.en: The conflict drives the story forward.
sentences.cn: 冲突推动故事向前发展。
比起非虚构，我更喜欢小说。

words.synonymDiff: essay侧重短文随笔, composition侧重学生作文
edit侧重编辑修改内容, revise侧重修订改进
revise侧重修订改进, edit侧重编辑, modify侧重局部修改
proofread侧重校对错误, check泛指检查
persuade侧重说服行动, convince侧重说服相信
perspective侧重看问题的角度, viewpoint侧重观点, point of view最通用

sentences.en: Make sure to proofread your essay.
Try to see it from a different perspective.
sentences.cn: 试着从不同的角度去看。
你的论证需要更多证据。

empathy侧重感同身受, understanding侧重理解, compassion侧重同情怜悯

sentences.en: It takes courage to stand up for what's right.
Try to have empathy for others.

bias侧重偏见倾向, prejudice侧重歧视偏见

examples.cn: 批判性思维是一种技能。

words.synonymDiff: creativity侧重创造力, imagination侧重想象力

examples.cn: 一个有创意的解决方案。

words.synonymDiff: strategy侧重长远策略, plan侧重具体计划, approach侧重方式方法

words.synonymDiff: law侧重法律, rule侧重规则, regulation侧重条例规章

sentences.cn: 在民主社会中，人们可以投票。
每个人都有权利和责任。

sentences.cn: 法律是为了保护人民而制定的。

examples.en: I have anxiety about the test.

words.synonymDiff: anxiety侧重焦虑不安, worry侧重担心, nervousness侧重紧张
compassion侧重深切同情, empathy侧重感同身受, sympathy侧重表示同情
humility侧重谦逊美德, modesty侧重谦虚低调

admiration侧重钦佩赞赏, respect侧重尊重尊敬
envy侧重嫉妒想拥有, jealousy侧重嫉妒怕失去
inspired侧重受到启发鼓舞, motivated侧重有动力去做
content侧重知足满意, satisfied侧重满足达到期望

Have compassion for those in need.
sentences.cn: 对有需要的人怀有同情心。

sentences.en: I feel inspired by her story.
sentences.cn: 她的故事让我受到启发。

therapy侧重专业治疗, counseling侧重心理咨询辅导
support侧重支持帮助(持续性), help泛指帮忙
boundary侧重界限边界, limit侧重限制上限
emotion侧重情感(较正式), feeling侧重感觉感受(较日常)

sentences.en: It's okay to ask for support.

sentences.en: An algorithm is a set of steps.
We need to debug this program.
sentences.cn: 我们需要调试这个程序。

words.synonymDiff: artificial intelligence是全称, AI是缩写, 意思相同
machine learning是全称, ML是缩写, 意思相同
virtual reality是全称, VR是缩写, 意思相同

examples.en: Augmented reality mixes real and digital.
examples.cn: 增强现实混合了真实和数字。

words.synonymDiff: augmented reality是全称, AR是缩写, 意思相同

examples.cn: 神经网络从数据中学习。

words.synonymDiff: smart侧重聪明机灵, intelligent侧重智力高有才智
sensor侧重传感器(技术), detector侧重探测器
autonomous侧重自主的(广义), self-driving特指自动驾驶

sentences.en: AI can help us solve complex problems.
sentences.cn: 人工智能可以帮我们解决复杂问题。
机器人变得越来越常见。
机器学习会随时间改进。

examples.en: In my opinion, this is wrong.
In my opinion, we should go.

words.synonymDiff: in my opinion较正式, I think最常用, I believe更确信

examples.en: On the other hand, it's risky.
On the other hand, it could work.

words.synonymDiff: for example和for instance意思相同, for instance稍正式
in conclusion较正式, to sum up较口语化

examples.cn: 此外，我们需要更多时间。

words.synonymDiff: furthermore较正式书面, moreover同义, additionally侧重补充
nevertheless最正式, however最常用, still最口语
moreover较正式, furthermore同义, besides侧重此外还有

examples.en: He was late. Consequently, he missed it.
examples.cn: 他迟到了。因此他错过了。

words.synonymDiff: consequently较正式, therefore常用, as a result最直白
in addition较正式, also最常用, besides更口语

sentences.en: In my opinion, reading is important.
On the other hand, it could be wrong.
sentences.cn: 另一方面，这可能是错的。
此外，数据支持了这一点。

sentences.en: In conclusion, we need to act now.
sentences.cn: 总之，我们需要现在行动。

words.synonymDiff: claim侧重声称宣称, assert侧重断言, state侧重陈述
counterargument侧重反驳论点, objection侧重反对意见
rebuttal侧重正式反驳, response侧重回应, refutation侧重驳斥
concede侧重让步承认, admit侧重承认事实, acknowledge侧重认可
acknowledge侧重正式认可, admit侧重承认(不情愿), recognize侧重认识到
clarify侧重澄清说明, explain侧重解释讲解
elaborate侧重详细阐述, expand侧重展开说, explain侧重解释
justify侧重为...辩护, explain侧重解释, defend侧重捍卫
contradict侧重自相矛盾, oppose侧重反对对抗
valid侧重有效合理, legitimate侧重合法正当

sentences.en: Can you clarify what you mean?
sentences.cn: 你能澄清一下你的意思吗？

sentences.en: I'd like to present a counterargument.
How can you justify that decision?
sentences.cn: 你怎么证明那个决定是合理的？

heritage侧重文化遗产, legacy侧重遗留传承
custom侧重风俗习惯, tradition侧重传统(更悠久)
ritual侧重仪式礼节, ceremony侧重典礼庆典
legend侧重传说故事, myth侧重神话
religion侧重宗教, faith侧重信仰, belief侧重信念

sentences.cn: 文化多样性让世界变得有趣。
我们应该尊重不同的习俗。

sentences.en: Every culture has its own legends.
sentences.cn: 每个文化都有自己的传说。

words.synonymDiff: ancient侧重古代久远的, old泛指旧的老的
modern侧重现代的, contemporary侧重当代的同时代的
era侧重时代纪元, age侧重时期, period侧重一段时期

sentences.en: The Tang Dynasty was a golden era.

sentences.cn: 很多国家为独立而斗争。

sentences.en: We live in the modern era.

I apologize较正式道歉, I'm sorry更日常
may I更礼貌正式, can I更日常口语
it seems that和it appears意思相同, appears稍正式

examples.en: I wonder if you can help.

words.synonymDiff: regarding较正式, about最常用, concerning较书面

examples.en: As a matter of fact, I agree.

words.synonymDiff: as a matter of fact较正式, actually最常用, in fact较简洁

examples.en: To be honest, I don't know.

words.synonymDiff: to be honest最常用, honestly较直接, frankly更坦率
in other words和that is to say意思相同, 后者更正式

May I ask you a question?
sentences.cn: 我可以问你一个问题吗？

sentences.en: In other words, we need more time.
sentences.cn: 换句话说，我们需要更多时间。

groups.title: 日常口语进阶 Advanced Daily Phrases
